ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., NPRE101) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course type (e.g., Lecture, Seminar) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses required to enroll */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_course_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_type_id") REFERENCES course_types ("course_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_types" (
  "course_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course type */,
  "course_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the course type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  "dean" TEXT /* Name of the department's dean */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the section meets */,
  "day" TEXT /* Days when the section meets */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the section meets */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the section */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "enrolled" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the section */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the section is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the section is offered */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the section is open for enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Instructor's office hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Current year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course section */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the section */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., Enrolled, Withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES course_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., available, in use) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the resource */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor providing the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the resource information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the student */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the feedback is anonymous */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
